title: Frontend: Hospital management and phlebotomist assignment UI

requirements.summary: Validate and wire hospital management flow with optimistic UI updates and proper error handling
acceptanceCriteria: Adding a hospital via AddHospitalModal creates a new entry visible in the list immediately after success
Editing a hospital via EditHospitalModal updates the displayed fields without a full page reload
Disabling a hospital removes it from the active list or marks it visually as disabled
Search filters hospitals by name, city, or area in real time

file_operations.description: Review and enhance the useAddHospital, useUpdateHospital, and useDisableHospital mutation hooks to ensure they include onSuccess callbacks that invalidate the hospitals query cache, triggering immediate list refresh. Ensure error handling propagates backend errors to the UI via toast notifications.

Verify that the HospitalManagementPage correctly invokes AddHospitalModal and EditHospitalModal with proper success/error toast feedback. Ensure the hospital list re-fetches or updates optimistically after add/edit/disable operations. Confirm the search input filters hospitals by name, city, and area in real time using the existing search state and filtered list logic.

Ensure the AddHospitalModal form submission calls the useAddHospital mutation and closes the modal on success. Add success toast notification after hospital creation. Verify form validation and error display for required fields.

Ensure the EditHospitalModal pre-populates the form with existing hospital data and calls the useUpdateHospital mutation on submission. Add success toast notification after update. Verify form validation and error display for required fields. Ensure the modal closes on success.

requirements.summary: Wire HospitalDetailsPage phlebotomist assignment UI to backend with confirmation dialogs and toast feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Assigning a phlebotomist from the search panel calls the backend and shows a success toast
Removing a phlebotomist shows a confirmation dialog before calling the backend
The phlebotomist list on HospitalDetailsPage refreshes after any assignment change
Errors from the backend are surfaced as error toasts

file_operations.description: Add or enhance mutation hooks useAssignPhlebotomistToHospital and useRemovePhlebotomistFromHospital that call the corresponding backend capabilities (assignPhlebotomistToHospital and removePhlebotomistFromHospital). Ensure onSuccess callbacks invalidate the query cache for phlebotomists assigned to the hospital, triggering a list refresh. Include error handling that surfaces backend errors via toast notifications.

Wire the phlebotomist search panel and assignment actions to the useAssignPhlebotomistToHospital mutation. Ensure the assign button calls the mutation with the hospital ID and selected phlebotomist principal, then shows a success toast on completion. Wire the remove button to show a confirmation dialog (with reason input field) before calling useRemovePhlebotomistFromHospital. Ensure the assigned phlebotomist list re-fetches after any assignment or removal. Display error toasts if the backend returns errors (e.g., non-existent principal, wrong role, or other validation failures).
